title: Retailer shares customer’s in-store behaviour with the customer’s employer
summary: A customer of a retail store complained that a store employee disclosed his personal information to his employer. The information consisted of the customer’s name and details regarding his behaviour as well as certain statements he made while interacting with store staff. The customer had concerns with several of the store’s practices, in...
